zh.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Sackville於大約1460年出生在英國素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆時，他的父親Humphrey Sackville31歲，母親Catherine Browne20歲。他於大約1482年與Isabel Digges在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1524年7月18日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國素可維提哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Sackville于大约1460年出生在英国素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆时，他的父亲Humphrey Sackville31岁，母亲Catherine Browne20岁。他于大约1482年与Isabel Digges在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1524年7月18日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国素可維提哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Sackville was born about 1460, in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, his father, Humphrey Sackville, was 31 and his mother, Catherine Browne, was 20. He married Isabel Digges about 1482, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 18 July 1524, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Withyham, Sussex, England.

fr.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Sackville est né environ 1460, à Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Sackville, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Catherine Browne, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Digges environ 1482, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 18 juillet 1524, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Sackville um 1460 in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humphrey Sackville 31 und seine Mutter Catherine Browne 20. Er hat um 1482 in England Isabel Digges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Juli 1524 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Withyham, Sussex, England begraben.

ko.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Sackville(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Sackville(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Browne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1482년 영국에서 Isabel Digges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1524년 7월 18일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 위스이함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Sackville nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Sackville, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Browne, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Digges aproximadamente 1482, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de julho de 1524, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Sackville родился около 1460 г. в местности буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey Sackville было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Browne, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Digges около 1482 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей. Он умер 18 июля 1524 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности витихам, суссекс, Англия.
